headline: Can Constellation Energy (CEG) Capitalize on the Growing Demand for Clean Electricity?
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the 10 Best Under-the-Radar Data Center Stocks to Buy. In the past year, the company’s stock jumped 36.87%, while it posted a 21.59% percent year-to-date. On April 22, Evercore ISI resumed coverage of Constellation Energy (CEG) with an Outperform rating and $380 price target, TheFly reported. The coverage […]
